_comment: Provenance metadata for Azure Ancient God Shield / Cyan Light Shield (青光盾). Auto-generated from canon database. Every item answers: Where did this originate? Who made it? When? Why? How old? What cultivation? Current owner? Known history?
name: Azure Ancient God Shield / Cyan Light Shield
abilities: 8-star Ancient God life-saving divine ability: Dreaming Back to Antiquity
Saved Wang Lin's life multiple times (vs Tian Yunzi, vs Seven-Colored Daoist)
Repaired when Wang Lin blasted open Gate of Emptiness

Named Dreaming Back to Antiquity (梦回太古)
